features.name: signal_extract_in_cyclic_ctrl_flow
features.description: Code should include a signal created via llhd.sig in one basic block and extracted via llhd.sig.extract in another basic block that is reachable through cyclic control flow, where the Mem2Reg pass fails to properly handle SSA dominance across the cycle.
features.snippet:
hw.module @Foo() {
  %0 = llhd.constant_time <0ns, 0d, 1e>
  %c0_i4 = hw.constant 0 : i4
  %c0_i32 = hw.constant 0 : i32
  llhd.process {
    cf.br ^bb2(%c0_i32 : i32)
  ^bb3:
    %out = llhd.sig %c0_i4 : i4
    cf.br ^bb4(%c0_i32 : i32)
  ^bb4(%4: i32):
    cf.cond_br %false, ^bb5, ^bb6
  ^bb5:
    %c0_i2 = hw.constant 0 : i2
    %5 = llhd.sig.extract %out from %c0_i2 : (!hw.inout<i4>) -> !hw.inout<i1>
    llhd.drv %5, %false after %0 : !hw.inout<i1>
    cf.br ^bb4(%c0_i32 : i32)
  ^bb6:
    cf.br ^bb2(%c0_i32 : i32)
  }
}

features.name: llhd_process_cyclic_ctrl_flow_with_signal_ops
features.description: Code should include an llhd.process region with multiple basic blocks forming cyclic control flow, containing llhd.sig, llhd.sig.extract, llhd.drv, and llhd.prb operations where signal definitions do not dominate all uses across backedge paths.
features.snippet:
hw.module @Foo() {
  %0 = llhd.constant_time <0ns, 0d, 1e>
  %c0_i4 = hw.constant 0 : i4
  %false = hw.constant false
  llhd.process {
    cf.br ^bb2
  ^bb2:
    cf.cond_br %false, ^bb3, ^bb8
  ^bb3:
    %out = llhd.sig %c0_i4 : i4
    cf.br ^bb4
  ^bb4:
    cf.cond_br %false, ^bb5, ^bb6
  ^bb5:
    %5 = llhd.sig.extract %out from %c0_i2 : (!hw.inout<i4>) -> !hw.inout<i1>
    llhd.drv %5, %false after %0 : !hw.inout<i1>
    cf.br ^bb4
  ^bb8:
    llhd.wait (%c0_i4, %2 : i4), ^bb1
  }
}

features.name: signal_extract_with_index_in_loop
features.description: Code should include llhd.sig.extract operation using a dynamic index to extract a portion of a signal, where the extracted signal is driven after a time delay in a loop body that cycles back to the loop header via control flow branches.
features.snippet:
hw.module @Foo() {
  %0 = llhd.constant_time <0ns, 0d, 1e>
  %c0_i2 = hw.constant 0 : i2
  %c0_i4 = hw.constant 0 : i4
  %false = hw.constant false
  llhd.process {
    cf.br ^bb4
  ^bb3:
    %out = llhd.sig %c0_i4 : i4
    cf.br ^bb4
  ^bb4:
    cf.cond_br %false, ^bb5, ^bb6
  ^bb5:
    %5 = llhd.sig.extract %out from %c0_i2 : (!hw.inout<i4>) -> !hw.inout<i1>
    llhd.drv %5, %false after %0 : !hw.inout<i1>
    cf.br ^bb4
  }
}
